With repo context in the prompt, Sheldon should run and extract claims about that fn.
HTTP 404 Not Found is defined in RFC 9110 for missing resources.
404 is the standard client error when a resource URI does not match any handler.
The Great Wall of China is visible from the Moon with the naked eye.
That Moon visibility claim is a common myth — astronauts report it is not visible unaided.
